component_groups.title: Component Groups
component_groups.description: Named groups of components that can be added or removed as a unit via events.

events.title: Events
events.description: Map of named events to their definitions.

additionalProperties.title: Event Definition
additionalProperties.description: Definition of an entity event. An event can add or remove component groups directly, or run a sequence/randomize of sub-events.

minecraft:entity_born.description: Triggers an event calls on an entity when the entity is born via `breeding`.

minecraft:entity_spawned.description: Triggers an event calls on an entity when the entity is spawned in the world.

minecraft:transformed.description: Triggers an event call on an entity that transforms into another entity.

minecraft:on_prime.description: Triggers an event calls on an entity when the entity is set to explode.
